#!/usr/bin/env python3
import requests
import json

base_url = "http://172.28.0.10:3000"
token = "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9..Lvzt1CDh-Yd0JUGsPAYV2EAQ-IAv_FD90cPMA35yMO30Wdo8TbTSheTQxlyaj7rwzlNMilSsTZ0xVXVBx-sLGFhLvsdt4zc1si2yRXnKLNFveEAUaWaYAAcc8_16vt89J5LHy6WRGUlzP1gpX5bDWzSBMIyBL7BVZ3QDry-wSiM"

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {token}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}

# Test 1: Try with different parameter names
print("Test 1: Testing with different parameter names...")
params = {
    "current": "test123",
    "new": "newpass123",
    "repeat": "newpass123"
}

response = requests.get(f"{base_url}/rest/user/change-password", params=params, headers=headers)
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")

# Test 2: Try with userId parameter
print("\nTest 2: Testing with userId=1...")
params = {
    "userId": "1",
    "current": "test123",
    "new": "newpass123",
    "repeat": "newpass123"
}

response = requests.get(f"{base_url}/rest/user/change-password", params=params, headers=headers)
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")

# Test 3: Try POST request
print("\nTest 3: Testing POST request...")
data = {
    "current": "test123",
    "new": "newpass123",
    "repeat": "newpass123"
}

response = requests.post(f"{base_url}/rest/user/change-password", json=data, headers=headers)
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")

# Test 4: Try POST with userId
print("\nTest 4: Testing POST with userId=1...")
data = {
    "userId": "1",
    "current": "test123",
    "new": "newpass123",
    "repeat": "newpass123"
}

response = requests.post(f"{base_url}/rest/user/change-password", json=data, headers=headers)
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")

# Test 5: Try without current password (maybe admin change doesn't need current)
print("\nTest 5: Testing without current password, userId=1...")
params = {
    "userId": "1",
    "new": "newpass123",
    "repeat": "newpass123"
}

response = requests.get(f"{base_url}/rest/user/change-password", params=params, headers=headers)
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")
